boundary.onPremActionMessage: Please report the error messages from your browser to your DataHub Administrator
bulkEditUnauthorized: Your bulk edit selection included entities that you are unauthorized to update. The bulk edit being performed will not be saved.
fallback.defaultMessage: Our team has been notified of this unexpected error and is working on a resolution.
fallback.subtitle: Something didn't go as planned.
fallback.title: Whoops!
section.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later, or reach out to your administrator
section.title: Something went wrong.
unauthorized: Unauthorized. Please contact your DataHub administrator.
